summary: Bug fix testing complete. All 3 reported bugs have been fixed and verified. (1) Support page now renders inside DashboardLayout when logged in - user stays logged in. (2) JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS is set to 168 (7 days) for session persistence. (3) Settings page has new 'Mobile App' tab with PWA install button. Regression tests for Calls page passed.
passed_tests: Bug Fix 1: /support page shows Sign In button for non-authenticated users
Bug Fix 1: /support page does NOT show sidebar for non-authenticated users
Bug Fix 1: /support page renders inside DashboardLayout with sidebar when logged in
Bug Fix 1: Clicking Support in sidebar does NOT log user out
Bug Fix 1: Sign In button is NOT visible for authenticated users on /support
Bug Fix 2: JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS=168 confirmed in backend/.env
Bug Fix 2: server.py correctly reads JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS from environment
Bug Fix 3: Settings page 'Mobile App' tab visible
Bug Fix 3: PWA Install button present with correct data-testid
Bug Fix 3: PWA install instructions for Chrome/Edge, Safari iOS, Android visible
Regression: Dashboard loads correctly after login
Regression: 'Call History' tab visible with badge count
Regression: 'Scheduled' tab visible with badge count (4)
Regression: 'Upcoming Calls' banner showing scheduled calls
Regression: Stats cards visible (Total Calls, Completed, Avg Duration, AI Analyzed, Scheduled)
Regression: Scheduled calls list with edit/delete buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 user-reported bugs are FIXED: (1) Support page uses DashboardLayout when logged in - no logout issue. (2) JWT tokens expire in 7 days (168 hours). (3) Mobile App tab in Settings has PWA install button. App.js checkAuth only clears token on 401 response, not network errors. Previous Calls/Scheduling features still working (4 scheduled calls in system).

support_page_authenticated.behavior: Renders inside DashboardLayout with sidebar, no logout on navigation

support_page_non_authenticated.behavior: Shows public header with 'Sign In' button, no sidebar

bugs_fixed.bug: Clicking Support in sidebar logs user out
bugs_fixed.root_cause: SupportPage was not using DashboardLayout for authenticated users
bugs_fixed.fix: SupportPage now uses useAuth() hook and conditionally renders in DashboardLayout when user is logged in

bugs_fixed.bug: Session doesn't persist after closing browser
bugs_fixed.root_cause: JWT tokens expired after 24 hours, also checkAuth cleared token on any error including network issues
bugs_fixed.fix: JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS changed to 168 (7 days), checkAuth only clears token on 401 response

bugs_fixed.bug: Can't find mobile app/PWA install from within dashboard
bugs_fixed.root_cause: No PWA install option was available in the app
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'Mobile App' tab in Settings with PWA install button and instructions
